title: Allowing automations to access the Zendesk ticket ID integration field
excerpt: After working with Monday.com support due to a failed automation, it was found that automations cannot read data from the Zendesk ticket ID column. This is preventing critical automations from working. I request that aut…

posts.author: zgilbert (Zach Gilbert)
posts.cookedHtml: After working with Monday.com support due to a failed automation, it was found that automations cannot read data from the Zendesk ticket ID column. This is preventing critical automations from working. I request that automations can access this data.
